---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

[CV](fkdresume.pdf)

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.
-   Exchange Industrial Engineering, Eindhoven University of Technology, Netherlands,2025-2026

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Firm xxx, position xx, year xxx

2.  Firm yyy, position yyy, year yyy

## Internships

1.  Firm aaa, position xx, year xxx

2.  Firm bbb, position yyy, year yyy

# Projects

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies
